title: Pan-Seared Red Snapper
description: A simple and flavorful fish dish, pan-seared to perfection. Serve with your favorite sides.
instructions: Preheat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the snapper fillets with flaky sea salt and pepper.
Add a few drops of olive oil to the preheated skillet.
Sear the snapper fillets for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
Remove the snapper from the skillet and place on a plate.
Add the butter to the skillet and let it melt.
Serve the snapper with the melted butter spooned over the top.
